recommendations.title: Endless Love
recommendations.overview: A privileged girl and a charismatic boy's instant desire sparks a love affair made only more reckless by parents trying to keep them apart.

recommendations.title: Run Sweetheart Run
recommendations.overview: A woman runs for her life though the streets of Los Angeles after her blind date suddenly turns violent.

recommendations.title: Titanic

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: The Lady in the Van
recommendations.overview: The true story of the relationship between Alan Bennett and the singular Miss Shepherd, a woman of uncertain origins who ‘temporarily’ parked her van in Bennett’s London driveway and proceeded to live there for 15 years.

recommendations.title: Silent Hill

recommendations.title: Another Country
recommendations.overview: In Moscow in 1983, an American journalist interviews Guy Bennett, who recalls his last year at public school, fifty years before, and how it contributed to his becoming a spy.

recommendations.title: The Book of Henry

recommendations.title: Dumped
